description_long: This object is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) controller, featuring a rectangular, compact body with a light gray plastic casing and a dark gray faceplate. On the left side, there is a black cross-shaped directional pad (D-pad), while the right side houses two large red circular buttons labeled 'A' and 'B'. In the center, two small rectangular buttons labeled 'SELECT' and 'START' are positioned side by side. The top edge has a short, black cable extending outward, indicating its wired connectivity. The surface shows some wear, giving it a slightly aged appearance, and the iconic 'Nintendo' logo is printed in red on the right side.
description: A rectangular, gray NES controller with a black D-pad, two red buttons, and a short black cable. The surface features the Nintendo logo and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the controller, including the D-pad, SELECT and START buttons, and the two red A and B buttons.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the height and thickness of the controller, with the D-pad and cable visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back edge and the cable extending outward, with the tops of the red buttons and D-pad visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the controller's thickness and the red A and B buttons, with the D-pad partially visible.
